channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Ukraine denies 'absurd' Russian claims on nuclear weapons  Reuters
  2. Russia baselessly claims UK and France plan to give Ukraine nukes  Euronews.com
  3. Russia says Britain, France plotting to give Ukraine nuclear weapons  Anadolu Ajansı
  4. Kremlin Warns of Potential Threat of Ukraine Acquiring Nuclear Weapons From West  The Moscow Times
  5. ‘Russia Will Be Forced to Use Tactical Nukes’ – Medvedev Warns Over Alleged Kyiv Bomb Transfer  Kyiv Post

item.title: Iron Age massacre targeted women and children, new research reveals - Phys.org
item.description:
1. Iron Age massacre targeted women and children, new research reveals  Phys.org
  2. A large mass grave from the Early Iron Age indicates selective violence towards women and children in the Carpathian Basin  Nature
  3. Iron Age mass grave may hold unusual victims: mostly women and children  Science News
  4. A Mass Grave Uncovered in Serbia Hints at a Violent Iron Age Massacre That Targeted Women and Children  Smithsonian Magazine
  5. 2,800-year-old mass grave of women and children discovered in Serbia reveals 'brutal, deliberate and efficient' violence  Live Science

item.title: Ramaphosa thanks Putin for release of South Africans lured into Russia-Ukraine war - BBC
item.description:
1. Ramaphosa thanks Putin for release of South Africans lured into Russia-Ukraine war  BBC
  2. South Africa says most of a group of 17 men lured into fighting for Russia set to return home  Reuters
  3. South Africa secures release of 11 nationals lured to Russia to fight against Ukraine  Associated Press News
  4. South African president thanks Putin after 17 men ‘lured’ to Russian frontlines begin returning home  Fox News
  5. Eye on Africa - South Africa secures release of more nationals lured to Ukraine war  France 24

item.title: ‘A disgrace for humanity’: UGGC head on fourth anniversary of Ukraine war - Vatican News
item.description:
1. ‘A disgrace for humanity’: UGGC head on fourth anniversary of Ukraine war  Vatican News
  2. The Holy Father Marks Four Years of War in Ukraine with Renewed Plea for Peace  Relevant Radio
  3. Pope says switch off smartphones to make ‘space for silence’ in Lent  EWTN News
  4. Pope says peace in Ukraine 'cannot be postponed'  Reuters
  5. Pope sends medicine and heaters to Ukraine  Vatican News

item.title: Russian Offensive Campaign Assessment, February 23, 2026 - Institute for the Study of War
item.description:
1. Russian Offensive Campaign Assessment, February 23, 2026  Institute for the Study of War
  2. Pokrovsk and the Zaporizhzhia Bounce-Back: How the Front Is Shifting Into Spring  Ukrinform
  3. Russian Gains in 4th Year of Ukraine War Exceeded Previous 2 Years Combined: AFP Analysis of ISW Data  Kyiv Post
  4. The Russia-Ukraine War Report Card, Feb. 18, 2026  Russia Matters

item.source: Institute for the Study of War
